hero.body: Publikacija Tattoo is not only a tattoo studio but a creative space where different media and visions meet. We enjoy combining contemporary ideas with traditions that carry their own history. From this fusion emerge works that reveal the distinctive tone of our creative approach.

services.body1: Every tattoo begins with a conversation. We create custom designs tailored to your skin, style, and story — from delicate fine-line work to bold traditional pieces. No flash, no shortcuts.
services.body2: Linocuts are hand-carved relief prints — a centuries-old medium with a distinctly tactile result. We create limited edition prints, artist editions, and bespoke commissions.
services.body3: Open workshops for beginners and experienced artists alike. Learn linocut printing, tattoo drawing, or spend an afternoon making something with your hands.

videoSection.heading: Where ink meets paper
videoSection.body: Step inside Publikacija — a space built for slow, intentional making. Every tattoo and every print begins here, with conversation, craft, and a deep respect for the process.

artists.heading: Meet the artists
artists.lukasBio: I understand art as a skill that must be perfected every day. Tattoos and linocuts are my forms of expression — full of detail, movement, and action. I love to observe life in the city, my surroundings, and draw attention to the small details that make up the whole.
artists.artiomasBio: Inspired by the strange and the beautiful. My work blends illustrative storytelling with fine-line precision — cats, creatures, dark botanicals and everything in between.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.bookBody: Ready to start your project? Reach out to discuss your idea. Free consultations for tattoos, prints, and workshops.

book.heading: Book a session
book.intro: Fill in the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours to discuss your project. All consultations are free.
book.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your idea, preferred style, size, placement, or any other details…
book.successBody: Thank you — we'll be in touch within 24 hours to discuss your project.
book.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at info@publikacija.lt
book.tattooDesc: Book a consultation or session for a custom tattoo. Free initial consultation included.
book.printDesc: Commission a bespoke linocut print or discuss a limited edition series.
book.workshopDesc: Join one of our group printmaking or tattoo drawing workshops.
book.voucherDesc: Purchase a gift voucher for any amount — valid for all services.
book.workshopBody: Our workshops run as group sessions with limited spots. Browse the event details and reserve your place directly on Luma.

ourWork.heading: Our Work
ourWork.empty: No items yet — check back soon.

giftVouchers.heading: Gift Vouchers
giftVouchers.intro: Give someone the gift of a truly personal experience — a custom tattoo, a linocut print, or an afternoon workshop in the heart of Vilnius. Vouchers never expire.

steps.title: Choose an amount
steps.body: Pick one of the tiers above or request a custom amount.

steps.title: We send the voucher
steps.body: A beautifully designed digital voucher arrives by email, ready to gift.

steps.title: Recipient books in
steps.body: They choose a service and date — we take care of the rest.

giftVouchers.readyHeading: Ready to give a perfect gift?
giftVouchers.readyBody: Contact us and we'll arrange everything.

vouchers.label: Starter
vouchers.description: Perfect for a linocut print, workshop session, or contribution toward a small tattoo.

vouchers.label: Studio
vouchers.description: A solid contribution toward a custom tattoo or a full workshop series.

vouchers.label: Signature
vouchers.description: Cover a full custom tattoo session or a bespoke print project from start to finish.

vouchers.label: Custom amount
vouchers.description: Have a specific budget in mind? We can create a voucher for any amount you choose.
